<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Pemigatinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Pemazyre monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adults with locally advanced or metastatic cholangiocarcinoma with a fibroblast growth factor receptor 2 (FGFR2) fusion or rearrangement that...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（99.7%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（99.5%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（99.4%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（99.4%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（99.4%）</li>
<li>amyotrohpic lateral sclerosis type 22（99.3%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, susceptibility to（99.2%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（99.2%）</li>
<li>Mills syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（99.2%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（99.2%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>trichomegaly-retina pigmentary degeneration-dwarfism syndrome（99.2%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（99.2%）</li>
<li>lethal arthrogryposis-anterior horn cell disease syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>bilateral parasagittal parieto-occipital polymicrogyria（99.1%）</li>
<li>lower motor neuron syndrome with late-adult onset（99.1%）</li>
<li>monomelic amyotrophy（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
